name: Generate Password and Security Guide
description: Generate a random 16-character password using Python, research current password security best practices via web search, and save both to a text file.

tasks.name: Generate Random Password
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to generate a random 16-character password. Write Python code that: (1) imports random and string modules, (2) creates a character pool containing uppercase letters (A-Z), lowercase letters (a-z), digits (0-9), and special characters (!@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}|;:,.<>?), (3) uses random.choice() to select exactly 16 characters from this pool, (4) prints ONLY the generated password string with no additional text. Output the EXACT password generated - do NOT summarize as 'password generated'. The downstream task needs the actual password string.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a single 16-character string that includes at least one character from each category (uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character).

tasks.name: Search Password Security Best Practices
tasks.description: You MUST call web_search (or WebSearch if web_search is unavailable) to find current password security best practices for 2026. Search query should be: 'password security best practices 2026'. Output the FULL raw search results verbatim including all URLs, titles, and snippets. Do NOT summarize as 'results were found' - the downstream task needs the actual data to extract security tips. Include at least 3-5 search results with complete information.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains at least 3 complete search results with URLs starting with https://, titles, and description snippets about password security.

tasks.name: Write Password Guide File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create 'password_guide.txt'. Extract the password from task_001's output (it should be a 16-character string). Extract the key security tips from task_002's search results (summarize the main recommendations from the snippets, including tips about password length, complexity, storage, multi-factor authentication, etc.). Format the file as follows: First section titled 'Generated Password:' with the exact password from task_001 on the next line. Then a blank line. Then section titled 'Password Security Best Practices (2026):' followed by bullet points of the main tips extracted from task_002's search results. Include source URLs at the bottom.
tasks.success_criteria: File 'password_guide.txt' is created containing the 16-character password from task_001 and at least 5 security best practices extracted from task_002's search results, with source URLs included.
